name: Braised Beef and Musrooms (English)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Chuck steak, cut into 2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Set oven to 350°F (Mark 4).
2. Using a flameproof casserole dish, melt 1 oz. of butter and brown the meat on all sides.
3. Remove the steak from the dish and set aside.
4. Peel the onions and melt the remaining butter in the casserole.
5. Cook the onions for a few minutes.
6. Stir in the flour, then blend in the stock and continue stirring until boiling.
7. Return the steak to the pan and add the Port wine, herbs, bay leaf, salt, and pepper.
8. Stir until boiling.
9. Put the lid on the casserole and cook in the oven for 1 1/2 hours or until the meat is tender.
10. Slice the mushrooms and add to the casserole; cover again and cook for a further 1/2 hour.
11. Serves 4.
